query:
SELECT 
                b."title",
                b."author",
                b."cover_image_url" as cover_image,
                COUNT(r."id") as "rent_count"
            FROM "book_rentals" r
            JOIN "book" b ON b."id"::text = r."book_id"
            GROUP BY b."id", b."title", b."author", b."cover_image_url"
            ORDER BY "rent_count" DESC
            LIMIT 8
